description: Set the tolerance used when establishing node-to-node links. A node-to-node link can only be established if the distance between the two nodes is less than f . By default, f equals 1 × 10 -5 .

6.0.description: Set the tolerance used when establishing node-to-node links. A node-to-node link can only be established if the distance between the two nodes is less than f. By default, f equals 1 × 10-5.
